Description.enUS:
Caster unit that can push enemies back with its attacks. Can use Crushing Gravity and Shroud. Can be upgraded to use Portal.

Can attack ground and air units.

Ascended:
+45 Life
+100% Energy Regeneration
Unobstructed Vision
Detector

Tooltip.enUS:
+45 Life
+100% Energy Regeneration
Unobstructed Vision
Detector

+45 Life
+100% Energy Regeneration
Unobstructed Vision
Detector
Splits into two identical clones that start with 40% life and damage. These clones have 2 regeneration and when they reach full life their damage is restored to 100%.
Splits into two identical clones that start with 40% life and damage. These clones have 2 regeneration and when they reach full life their damage is restored to 100%.
Splits into two identical clones that start with 40% life and damage. These clones have 2 regeneration and when they reach full life their damage is restored to 100%.

Immobilizes enemy units in the target area for up to 7 seconds and forces air units to the ground. Detects cloaked units and forces burrowed units to unburrow.

Massive units are immune.
Temporarily cloaks and increases the movement speed of friendly units in the target area by 50% for 21 seconds unless they attack or receive damage.
Creates a portal entrance at the target location which teleports ground units that enter it to the next created portal exit. Lasts 18 seconds.
Activates the nearest inactive portal entrance in range linking it to the created portal exit.
This unit can detect cloaked or burrowed units within its sight range.
Tooltip.ruRU: Эта боевая единица может обнаруживать замаскированные или закопанные войска в поле обзора.
